summary: Good soundboard capture of a sweet mid‑set jam where Jerry almost slipped into "Comes A Time" after a nice Dark Star > Fun sequence.
review: The reviewer highlights a memorable moment when Jerry nearly segued into “Comes A Time” following a sweet Dark Star > Fun stretch, praising Jerry’s characteristic playing. No specific comments on the audio quality are given, but the recording appears listenable and likely sourced from a soundboard.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; positive remarks about performance but no information on recording quality, so rating leans toward a good show with assumed decent sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on clarity, mix, or other technical aspects of the recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes a smooth transition from Dark Star > Fun into a near‑drop into “Comes A Time,” indicating an engaging mid‑set flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Nice to hear Jerry being Jerry; his playing on the jam is praised.
